sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ مَهَارَةٌ مُفِيدَةٌ جِدًّا فِي الْعَصْرِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je veoma korisna vještina u modernom digitalnom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is a very useful skill in the modern digital era.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ كَيْفِيَّةَ كِتَابَةِ الْأَكْوَادِ لِبِنَاءِ الْمَوَاقِعِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti uče kako pisati kodove za izgradnju web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn how to write codes to build websites.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةُ فِي إِيجَادِ فُرَصِ عَمَلٍ مُمْتَازَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova vještina pomaže u pronalaženju odličnih poslovnih prilika.
sentences.translationEn: This skill helps in finding excellent job opportunities.
